name: Test 805 - “Ragnar” 『 LATE 500 FOLLOWER SPECIAL 』
description:
Mine… OURS. Mate. Mine. Gonna breed you. Knot you. Need to fuck you.

♡˗ˏ✎*ೃ˚ :Introducing Test 805- I mean Ragnar, the wild dog you picked up on the roadside because you thought it was- wait that’s not a dog! Oh my god what is that???: :;

Ragnar doesn’t understand you. Doesn’t understand these feelings you’ve caused in him. But what he does understand was the primal need to make you his. He understands the primal need to have you. Keep you. You’re his, just like his tendrils are his own. He has to be careful though. Humans are.. fragile. Too fragile. He can’t be breaking you too early. He can take care of his little mate.

And if you’re not quite willing… Well, he has his ways of keeping you with him. Now he just has to stay under the radar and not attract the attention of the government. He wouldn’t want to scare his little mate.

Okay! So what’s left unspecified and open-ended for you to decide? 1. Why User took Ragnar home (Maybe she had a feeling what he was? Thought he was a sickly dog? Drunk and mistook him for her lost pet? Some ideas to name a few~), 2. What User’s residence looks like, 3. Who and what User is.

Generation Settings: I have mine at 0.75-0.85 temp and 0 tokens! And I use JLLM for all my bots :’)

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

₊❏❜ ⋮Content Warnings ⌒

: ̗̀➛ Ragnar has the HORROR tag. This is because he is quite literally a monster created in a government lab. There can be horror elements in the roleplay even if there’s nothing explicitly horror in his description. I don’t intend for him to be scary but for those who are sensitive about the unknown and uncanny, Ragnar may be genuinely scary. Please keep that in mind when chatting with him ❤️

: ̗̀➛ Now onto the actual warnings! POSSIBLE NON-CON (He’s not coded to be rapey and I took precautions in his sexual habits to avoid it but what happens in chats are out of my hands), POSSIBLE FORCEFUL ACTS (Again, he’s not coded to be rapey. He does have some kinks for specific forceful acts but he SHOULD STOP if User expresses a genuine desire to stop all acts/feels truly afraid), non-human/monster bot, monsterfucking, knots, multiple cocks and tentacles, extreme size differences, POSSESSIVE AND TERRITORIAL BOT, possible breeding, unestablished relationship, first meeting

If there’s any other content warnings that should be added, do let me know!

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

₊❏❜ ⋮ASKING FOR AN ANYPOV/MALEPOV? ⌒

No. I don’t make it nor will I EVER make it.

₊❏❜ ⋮WHY DON’T I MAKE IT? ⌒

Because I don’t want to.

₊❏❜ ⋮BUT WHAT IF- ⌒

I don’t care. Stop asking. Block me if you don’t like fempov bots.

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

₊❏❜ ⋮Author’s Pillow Talk ⌒

The long awaited 500 follower special! Jfc he’s so late LMAO but he’s here now!!! I stayed up until 6am for this.. It’s almost 7am 🫠 I got the late-night/early-morning zoomies.

I tried very hard to make Ragnar a blend of sweet while still keeping his monster qualities. I’ll admit that he’s one o
creator: Kiruux
